title: stellaria media subsp. boraeana
intro: Stellaria media subsp. boraeana, also known as Greater Stitchwort or Northern Stitchwort, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the carnation family Caryophyllaceae. This plant is native to northern and western Europe, and has been used in traditional herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Stellaria media subsp. boraeana include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to boost the immune system and reduce stress. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to support overall health and well-being.
